features.name: sign extension mismatch in add with mixed-width operands
features.description: Code should include addition between a 1-bit signed operand and a sign-extended wider operand, where sign extension differs between compilers

features.name: div with zero-initialized wire divisor
features.description: Code should include division where the divisor is a wire initialized to zero from a constant

features.name: register with async reset feeding reduction
features.description: Code should include a register with asynchronous reset whose output feeds a reduction operation
